title: metastelma occidentale
intro: Metastelma occidentale, also known as the western Metastelma or western Mexican Metastelma, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico. It is a member of the Apocynaceae family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and alkaloids. Herbal preparations of Metastelma occidentale often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
